meta.title: GlobalTax.AI Compliance Knowledge Base
meta.scope: Verified compliance + tax knowledge for India, US, UAE, KSA, Egypt — used as grounding for AI assistant
meta.sources: Authoritative — statute/regulation with citations. Where pending official publication, flagged 'uncertain'.

corporate_tax_fy25_26.default_rate: 30% (turnover > ₹400cr in prev FY); 25% if turnover ≤ ₹400cr in FY23-24

s115BAA.conditions: No exemptions/deductions; no MAT; irrevocable election

s115BAB.conditions: New manufacturing co. incorporated on/before 31-Mar-2024 (sunset); commence mfg by 31-Mar-2024

corporate_tax_fy25_26.foreign_co: 35% (reduced from 40% via Finance Act 2024) + surcharge 2%/5% + 4% cess
corporate_tax_fy25_26.MAT: 15% of book profit + surcharge + cess (NOT applicable under 115BAA/115BAB); AMT 18.5% for LLP/non-corp

gst.current_slabs: 0%, 5%, 12%, 18%, 28% + compensation cess on sin/luxury (tobacco, aerated drinks, autos)
gst.reform_2025: GST Council Sep-2025 announced rationalisation to 2 main slabs (5%, 18%) + 40% demerit rate; phased FY25-26
gst.registration: Goods ₹40L (₹20L special category states); Services ₹20L (₹10L special)
gst.composition_scheme: Goods ≤₹1.5cr (1% / 5% restaurants); Services ≤₹50L @6%; no ITC, no interstate
gst.QRMP: AATO ≤₹5cr: quarterly GSTR-1/3B with monthly PMT-06 (35% challan or self-assessment)
gst.e_invoicing: Mandatory if AATO > ₹5cr (since 01-Aug-2023); 30-day IRN reporting mandate for AATO ≥₹10cr from 01-Apr-2025
gst.ITC_rules: §16 CGST Act; invoice must appear in GSTR-2B; supplier must file GSTR-1 and pay; 180-day payment rule; blocked credits §17(5)
gst.cite: CGST Act 2017; Notif 10/2023-CT; GSTN advisory Nov-2024

labour_codes_status.status: 4 Codes enacted (Wages 2019; IR/SS/OSH 2020); Centre 'appointed day' NOT yet notified — repeatedly deferred
labour_codes_status.state_rules: 32+ states/UTs have pre-published draft rules across all 4 codes; full harmonised notification pending; Wages Code rules most advanced
labour_codes_status.expectation: Staggered implementation likely; Code on Wages may notify ahead; exact date uncertain

obbba_2026.senior_deduction_bonus: up to $6,000 single / $12,000 couples; phase-out begins $75,000 AGI
obbba_2026.overtime_deduction: up to $12,500 (qualified OT, personal return only)
obbba_2026.tips_deduction: up to $25,000 (qualified tips, personal return only)
obbba_2026.car_loan_interest: up to $10,000 (new US-assembled vehicles under 14,000 lbs)
obbba_2026.roth_catch_up_rule: High earners (>$150k prior-year income) age 50+ must make catch-up contributions on Roth (after-tax) basis

US.states_summary_pointer: See /data/compliance/us-states-2026.json — all 50 states + DC with income tax rate, SUI wage base, min wage, notable rules.

rates.pillar_two_DMTT: 15% Domestic Minimum Top-up Tax for MNEs with consolidated revenue ≥ €750M, effective FY starting on/after 01-Jan-2025 (Cabinet Decision 142/2024)

corporate_tax.small_business_relief: Revenue ≤ AED 3M per tax period → NIL taxable income; available through tax periods ending on/before 31-Dec-2026 (MD 73/2023)

QFZP.conditions: Adequate substance; qualifying income per CD 100/2023 & 265/2023; de-minimis (lower of 5% or AED 5M); audited FS; no election out; arm's-length TP

corporate_tax.participation_exemption: Art. 23: 5% min ownership, 12-month holding, subject to 9%+ tax, ≤50% non-qualifying assets
corporate_tax.filing: Return + payment within 9 months of tax period end; registration mandatory via FTA portal; no advance tax

vat.exempt: financial services, bare land, local passenger transport

free_zones.DIFC: Financial FZ (Dubai); English common law + DIFC Courts; DIFC Employment Law 2/2019 (amended 4/2021, 2024); DEWS mandatory; QFZP-eligible
free_zones.ADGM: Financial FZ (Abu Dhabi); direct English common law; ADGM Employment Regs 2019 (amended 2024); WPS; QFZP-eligible
free_zones.JAFZA: Industrial/logistics FZ (Dubai); UAE Federal Labour Law 33/2021 applies; MOHRE WPS; QFZP-eligible for trading/logistics
free_zones.DMCC: Commercial FZ (commodities, Dubai); UAE Federal Labour Law; QFZP-eligible; distribution from Designated Zone qualifies

zakat_and_tax.zakat_rate: 2.5775% of Zakat base (Hijri) or 2.5% (Gregorian); Saudi/GCC shareholder share only
zakat_and_tax.zakat_base: ZATCA formula: higher of (adjusted net income) or (equity + provisions + LT liabilities − LT assets − investments)
zakat_and_tax.mixed_entity: Zakat on Saudi/GCC %; CIT on foreign %
zakat_and_tax.filing: CIT/Zakat return within 120 days of FY-end; advance payments in 3 instalments (months 6, 9, 12) if prior tax ≥ SAR 500k
zakat_and_tax.cite: Income Tax Law RD M/1 of 1425H; Zakat Implementing Regs 2019 (amended 2024)

nitaqat_2026.framework: Saudization quotas by sector + firm size band (Entry/Low-Green/Mid-Green/High-Green/Platinum); Nitaqat 2.0 from 2021, rolling phase-ins 2024-26
nitaqat_2026.indicative_pct: Wholesale/retail 15-30%; construction 8-25%; ICT 20-40%; finance 30-50%; professional services 30-45%; hospitality 10-25% (varies by firm size)
nitaqat_2026.weighting: Saudi female workers often 1.5-2x weighted; high-wage Saudis weighted; part-time rules
nitaqat_2026.penalties: Red band: block new work visas, no visa renewals, no govt service access, license-suspension risk, tenders ineligible

corporate_tax.special: Suez Canal Authority, EGPC, CBE: 40%; oil & gas E&P: 40.55%
corporate_tax.filing: Within 4 months after FY-end (Law 91/2005 Art. 82); self-assessment; monthly instalments for large taxpayers
corporate_tax.sme_regime: Law 6/2025 simplified regime: turnover ≤ EGP 20M → tiered tax 0.4%-1.5% of turnover

vat.schedule_tax: Simplified table rates on specific goods (professional services 10%; media 20%; petroleum varied)
vat.exempt: Basic foodstuffs, healthcare, education, financial services, residential rent, some insurance (Law 67/2016)
vat.einvoicing: Mandatory B2B/B2C (e-receipt) nationwide by ETA; all taxpayers covered as of 2024
vat.filing: Monthly return; normal VAT within 1 month of period end, schedule tax within 2 months
